creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 174184
tigervnc 1.6.90 update

The current tigervnc doesn't support xorg-server 1.18.0. Update to 1.6.90 (1.7.0 beta) release, released in juli,  which supports it this xorg-server version.

Please approve of this patch so we can import xorg-server 1.18.0 and newer ddx drivers.
